sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 156:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 156:1
items.html: It is because in each Sefira where illumination of GAR expands, its VAK, which is in the Sefira below it, instantaneously return to it. When it expands in Hochma and Bina, illumination of GAR returns to the Partzuf and expands in Hesed. Thus, its VAK in Gevura return to it. At that time, it expands in Tifferet, and VAK of Netzah return to it, and expands in Hod, and VAK in Yesod return to Hod, and expands in Malchut. (Inner Light, Item‎ 47)
